title: 2026-07-22｜Daily English

reviewQuiz.zh: 在确认订单前展示完整价格明细
reviewQuiz.answer: show a complete price breakdown before confirming the order

reviewQuiz.zh: 防止页面加载时发生布局偏移
reviewQuiz.answer: prevent layout shift while the page is loading
implement a focus trap for the modal

reviewQuiz.zh: 移除监听器以避免内存泄漏
reviewQuiz.answer: remove event listeners to prevent a memory leak

reviewQuiz.zh: 记录新增需求以避免范围蔓延
reviewQuiz.answer: document new requests to avoid scope creep

reviewQuiz.zh: 确保会议事项得到持续推进
reviewQuiz.answer: ensure strong follow-through after the meeting

reviewQuiz.zh: 为自行中转预留足够时间
reviewQuiz.answer: leave enough time for a self-transfer
check the visa waiver rules before departure

words.meaning: 部分退款；仅退还订单金额中的一部分
words.sentence: The system should allow support agents to issue a partial refund for one canceled item.

words.meaning: 争议解决；处理付款、订单或服务纠纷的过程
words.sentence: A clear dispute resolution process helps both the customer and the service team understand the next step.

words.meaning: 库存占用；在付款完成前临时保留库存
words.sentence: Release the inventory hold automatically when the payment session expires.

words.meaning: 代码分割；按页面或功能拆分并按需加载代码
words.sentence: Use code splitting to reduce the initial JavaScript bundle size.

words.meaning: 请求取消；停止已经发出但不再需要的网络请求
words.sentence: The search page should support request cancellation when the user changes the destination quickly.

words.meaning: 无障碍树；辅助技术用来理解页面结构和控件语义的信息结构
words.sentence: Inspect the accessibility tree to confirm that the dialog has a clear name and description.

words.meaning: 验收标准；判断需求是否完成并可交付的具体条件
words.sentence: Define the acceptance criteria before development starts to reduce later disagreements.

words.meaning: 待办事项；会议后需要由明确负责人完成的任务
words.sentence: Assign each action item to one owner and include a due date.

words.meaning: 直飞航班；途中不经停其他机场的航班
words.sentence: A nonstop flight may cost more, but it reduces connection risk.

words.meaning: 入境要求；进入目的地国家或地区必须满足的条件
words.sentence: Check the entry requirements again before leaving for the airport.

focus: 动态复习：继续区分 chargeback / partial refund / dispute resolution，分别对应拒付、部分退款和争议处理流程。
技术强化：把 layout shift / focus trap / memory leak 与今天的 code splitting / request cancellation / accessibility tree 组成一次页面质量检查。
沟通表达：用 scope creep / follow-through / acceptance criteria / action item 描述如何控制需求范围并推动事项落地。
旅行复习：将 self-transfer / visa waiver / nonstop flight / entry requirement 组成订票前与出发前检查清单。
